scenario: A property owner with no Swedish contact address applies for a coordination number, using only the foreign contact address block (Adressrad 1-3, Land), exercising the form's own 'Anges endast om svensk kontaktadress saknas' alternative-address path. The applicant also has a previous surname from a prior marriage.

fields.connectionDescription: I own a holiday property in Åre, Sweden, which I visit several times a year.
fields.coordinationNumberReason: I need a coordination number to be registered as the owner of my Swedish property and to pay the associated property tax.
